channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Mozilla’s new message: We’re the only browser not backed by billionaires
item.description: As frustration with corporate power grows under the oligarch-friendly Trump administration, Mozilla Firefox stands out more than ever for at least one defining trait: It isn’t owned by a giant tech company.
item.dc:creator: Rob Pegoraro, Fast Company

item.title: Minnesota considers blocking 'nudify' apps that use AI to make explicit images without consent
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Molly Kelly was stunned to discover in June that someone she knew had used widely available “nudification” technology to create highly realistic and sexually explicit videos and images of her, using family photos that were posted on social media.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: YouTube TV might be planning a big Netflix update that puts the best streaming services first
item.description: YouTube is reportedly planning some big changes to its TV app, including adding more paid-for streaming services to its homepage.
item.dc:creator: amelia.schwanke@futurenet.com (Amelia Schwanke), TechRadar

item.title: TikTok’s ‘airport theory’ dares you to arrive just 15 minutes before your flight
item.description: When it comes to airports, travelers tend to fall into two camps. There are the anxious types who show up four hours early, with plenty of time to leisurely peruse duty-free and enjoy the airport lounge.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: NASA's two stuck astronauts are finally closing in on their return to Earth after 9 months in space
item.description: NASA's two stuck astronauts are just a few weeks away from finally returning to Earth after nine months in space.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bang & Olufsen's latest reworked turntable is a masterpiece of retro revival, in a breathtaking wooden presentation box
item.description: A design classic returns and is even more desirable than before – but don't expect to see them in stores.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft Teams and other Windows tools hijacked to hack corporate networks
item.description: Hackers are using benign Windows tools in malicious attacks, resulting in the deployment of advanced backdoors.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: DECATUR, Ga. (AP) — Outside Beacon Hill Middle School in the Atlanta suburb of Decatur, like along hundreds of roadsides across Georgia, the unblinking eye of a camera tickets drivers who speed through a school zone.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Another iconic Disney Castle is getting the Lego treatment, and this one roars
item.description: Making its debut at the 2025 Toy Fair alongside the Lego Ideas River Steamboat and a massive Lego T-Rex – is the Lego Disney Beauty and the Beast Castle building set.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Popular female streamers are bringing on security after stars were attacked during an IRL stream
item.description: Female streamers are being told to hire security after a spate of recent attacks. Popular Twitch stars Valkyrae, Cinna, and Emiru were out in public at the Santa Monica Pier on March 2 as part of their “sisathon” streaming marathon, when a man lunged toward them, saying, “I’ll kill you right now.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Sony is now issuing PS Plus compensation following the recent PSN outage
item.description: PlayStation Plus subscribers are officially receiving compensation following the PSN outage last month.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Salesforce’s AgentExchange targets AI agent adoption, monetization
item.description: Salesforce is launching a new marketplace named AgentExchange for its agents and agent-related actions, topics, and templates to increase adoption of AI agents and allow its partners to monetize them.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Uber teams up with Waymo to start selling driverless rides in Austin, Texas
item.description: Uber is shifting into a new gear in Austin, Texas where its ride-hailing service will begin dispatching self-driving cars to pick up passengers looking for a way to get around that city.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Casey Anthony, mom acquitted in toddler's death, joins TikTok
item.description: Casey Anthony, a Florida mother who was acquitted of murder charges in the death of her 2-year-old daughter Caylee, has joined TikTok to brand herself as a "legal advocate.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, NewsNation

item.title: DeepSeek
item.description: DeepSeek, founded in 2023 by Liang Wenfeng, a Chinese entrepreneur, engineer and former hedge fund manager, is generating a lot of buzz — and for good reason. Here are five things that make it stand out (as well as a listing of the latest news and analysis about DeepSeek).
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: EV-maker BYD seeks to raise $5.2 billion with share sale
item.description: Chinese electric vehicle maker BYD has launched a sale of its Hong Kong shares to raise up to $5.2 billion via an accelerated book-building, according to a deal term sheet seen by Reuters on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: TypeScript 5.8 reaches general availability
item.description: Microsoft’s TypeScript 5.8, the latest version of the company’s strongly typed superset of JavaScript, has reached general availability (GA).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: LA Times to give op-eds AI-generated political rating, list of alternate views
item.description: The Los Angeles Times has launched an AI-driven "bias meter" to provide readers with alternative perspectives on opinion content.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, The Hill

item.title: Palo Alto expands secure private 5G network partnerships
item.description: Palo Alto Networks is looking to expand the role SASE plays in securing private 5G networks by collaborating with additional partners to offer end-to-end communications protection.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Hegseth halts cyber operations against Russia: Reports
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has halted offensive cyber operations against Russia, according to media reports. The Pentagon chief ordered U.S. Cyber Command to pause offensive operations last week, CNN and NBC reported. The move comes amid what appears to be a broader shift in U.S.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: TSMC will invest $100B in US chip manufacturing
item.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) plans to invest $100 billion to build chip manufacturing plants in the U.S., President Trump announced Monday. The multibillion-dollar investment, first reported by The Wall Street Journal, will stretch out over the next four years.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Bitcoin jumps after Trump strategic reserve announcement
item.description: The cryptocurrency market surged over the weekend after President Trump announced his plans to create a strategic crypto reserve and hinted at details about the highly anticipated plan.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Americans split over Musk, federal workforce cuts: Survey
item.description: Americans in a new survey are split over their views of Elon Musk and his Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), as well as federal workforce cuts during the opening weeks of the second Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, The Hill

item.title: New malware exploits fake updates to steal data
item.description: New malware "FrigidStealer" targets Mac computers. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson offers four ways to stay safe from infostealer malware.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UK data protection watchdog investigating how TikTok uses children's personal data
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The U.K.'s data protection watchdog said Monday that it's investigating how TikTok uses the personal information of teenagers to deliver content recommendations to them when they use the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: TrapC proposal to fix C/C++ memory safety
item.description: TrapC, a fork of the C language, is being developed as a potential solution for memory safety issues that have hindered the C and C++ languages. TrapC is a proposed C-language extension compiler intended to be implemented as a cybersecurity compiler for C and C++ code, said developer Robin Rowe.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI in first motorsports venture for AI company
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Chip Ganassi Racing on Friday said it has partnered on a strategic research collaboration with OpenAI — a deal that makes the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Tech layoffs this year: A timeline
item.description: 2025 began in turmoil, with layoffs at some of the largest tech companies despite the support shown by the new US administration. 2024 had been a year of recovery, with the pace of layoffs slowing and IT employment the highest for years following two years of massive IT layoff in 2022 and 2023.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Google co-founder: Be in the office every weekday, work 60 hours a week
item.description: Google co-founder Sergey Brin sent an internal message Wednesday to the group working on the company’s AI model Gemini. In the message, Brin wrote that Google can become a leader in AI development — provided that employees work more.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: R.I.P. Skype: 2003-2025
item.description: The time is up for Skype, one of the O.G.s of online communication. The once-popular 22-year-old communications software is being retired by Microsoft in May 2025, with the company’s Teams collaboration suite replacing its predecessor.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: How to restore a deleted text message on iPhone
item.description: Accidentally deleting a text message on your iPhone or iPad is not a problem if you still need the message. Apple has a built-in way to recover it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What is retrieval-augmented generation? More accurate and reliable LLMs
item.description: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is a technique used to “ground” large language models (LLMs) with specific data sources, often sources that weren’t included in the models’ original training.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft’s Phi-4-multimodal AI model handles speech, text, and video
item.description: Microsoft has introduced a new AI model that, it says, can process speech, vision, and text locally on-device using less compute capacity than previous models.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Gabbard decries Britain's reported demand for Apple to provide backdoor access to users' cloud data
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard says she has serious concerns about the British government's reported demand that Apple provide backdoor access to any data stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: One Tech Tip: Getting a lot of unwanted phone calls? Here are ways to stop them
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Unwanted phone calls are out of control. Whether it's a robocall trying to sell you something or spam calls from scammers trying to rip you off, it's enough to make you want to stop answering your phone.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: NFL NextGen Stats team unveils new tool to help fans better understand combine results
item.description: The NFL scouting combine provides a blizzard of data with hundreds of prospects running through various drills ranging from the 40-yard dash to the vertical jump to a short shuttle.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nvidia sales surge in the fourth quarter on demand for AI chips
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Nvidia on Wednesday reported a surge in fourth-quarter profit and sales as demand for its specialized Blackwell chips, which power artificial intelligence systems, continued to grow, sending the company's stock higher after hours. For the three months that ended Jan.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
